title: Support ## delay on implication RHS in SVA properties
body:
## Summary
This patch adds support for sequence expressions (cycle delays via `##`) on the RHS of SVA implication operators (`|->` and `|=>`), per IEEE 1800-2023 Section 16.12.7. Previously, Verilator rejected all implications involving sequence expressions with a blanket `UNSUPPORTED` error in `V3Width`, regardless of whether the sequence appeared on the LHS or RHS.

## Reproducer
```systemverilog
module t (input clk);
  logic a, b;
  assert property (@(posedge clk) a |-> ##1 b);
  assert property (@(posedge clk) a |=> ##2 b);
endmodule
```

On master:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t.v:3:37: Unsupported: Implication with sequence expression
                                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   3 |   assert property (@(posedge clk) a |-> ##1 b);
     |                                     ^~~
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t.v:4:37: Unsupported: Implication with sequence expression
                                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   4 |   assert property (@(posedge clk) a |=> ##2 b);
     |                                     ^~~
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
```

## Changes
- Remove blanket `m_hasSExpr` implication check from `V3Width.cpp` that rejected all implication+sequence combinations
- Add LHS/RHS distinction in `V3AssertPre::visit(AstImplication*)`: LHS sequence expressions (`AstPExpr` as antecedent) remain unsupported with a more specific error message ("as antecedent")
- For RHS sequence expressions, wrap the `AstPExpr` body with an antecedent guard (`AstSampled` for overlapped `|->`, `AstPast` for non-overlapped `|=>`), so the sequence only starts when the antecedent holds
- Update `t_property_sexpr_unsup.out` golden file: error count drops from 8 to 6 (two RHS-only cases now pass), remaining errors show refined message

## Test
- Added `test_regress/t/t_property_imply_delay.v` and `.py` — tests overlapped (`|-> ##1`, `|-> ##2`) and non-overlapped (`|=> ##2`) implication with cycle delays on RHS
- Updated `test_regress/t/t_property_sexpr_unsup.out` — reflects refined error messages and removal of two now-supported cases

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
